titles.ar: باب أَنَّ مِيرَاثَ أَهْلِ الْمِلَلِ بَيْنَهُمْ عَلَى كِتَابِ اللَّهِ وَ سُنَّةِ نَبِيِّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله )
titles.en: Chapter 38 – The inheritance of the people of the (other) Religions among them upon the Book of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and the Sunnah of His<sup>azwj</sup> Prophet<sup>saww</sup>
